message:
fix: Consolidate GPU implementations and fix test failures

- Move src/webgpu/ to src/client/webgpu/ for cleaner imports
- Delete incomplete src/client/gpu/ directory
- Fix WGSL shader name collision in gpu-joins.js (init_table fn vs var)
- Add isAvailable() method to GPUAggregator class
- Make count() method synchronous in GPUAggregator
- Fix demo page ast.search undefined error (use query object)
- Remove obsolete opfs-joins.spec.js (tested deleted JS SQL layer)
- Clean up unit-tests.spec.js (remove SQL Lexer/Parser tests)
- Export GPU functions from client/index.js

All 17 GPU tests now pass, along with 100 vault-sql tests.
